name: ASRock Z690M-ITX/ax Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel Z690 Chipset - Support DDR4-5000(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - HDMI - DisplayPort - Dragon 2.5G LAN - Intel Gigabit LAN - 802.11ax WiFi 6E - BT 5.2
shortName: ASRock Z690M-ITX/ax Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel
description: Mini-ITX Intel Z690 motherboard for LGA 1700 CPUs with PCIe 5.0, DDR4-5000 support, and WiFi 6E.
